km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill於大約1375年出生在英國。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1431年在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill于大约1375年出生在英国。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1431年在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brockhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Surrey): perhaps a habitational name from any of several minor places called Rockhill, such as Rockhill Farm in Stourton Caundle (Dorset) or Rockhill Farm in Greete (Shropshire). However, early forms for these particular places have not been found and so the surname may alternatively be a variant of   Rochelle   (compare   Rockett  ).

variants.name: Rochelle
meanings: French (mainly Ille-et-Vilaine) and English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from (La) Rochelle, the name of several places in various parts of France, especially that in Manche, from a diminutive of Old French roche ‘rock, cliff, promontory’. In Britain, the surname is often recorded in its Norman French form Rokel(l)e.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill was born about 1375, in England. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1431, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill est né environ 1375, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1431, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill wurde um 1375 in England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1431 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill è nato il circa 1375 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1431, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhillは約1375年にイギリスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1431年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill(은)는 대략 1375년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1431년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1431, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill родился около 1375 г. в местности Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1431 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Brockhill nació aproximadamente 1375, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1431, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.

th.about 1375–1431: ประมาณปี 1375–ปี 1431
